TO STAY CIVIL, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, JANE D. HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JANE KILPATRICK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXIST AS TO WHETHER THE DEFENDANT WAIVE THE RIGHT TO EVICT. OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTY. ALLINGHAM EXERCISED HIS CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE GOLDSMITH AND WAS SWORN IN OPEN COURT. THE MOTION WAS OPPOSED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. DEFENDANT JANE KILPATRICK'S MOTION TO STAY CIVIL PROCEEDINGS; MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND CONFIDENTIALITY ORDER IS TRANSFERRED TO THE TRIAL JUDGE WHO WOULD BE HEARING THE MATTER ON SEPTEMBER 19, 2011. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-16-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-19-2011 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON NOV-21-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN 206 FOR SETTLEMENT PROTECTIVE DATE PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES FOR APPROVAL FROM THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT. ALL PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. DEFENDANT JANE KILPATRICK'S MOTION TO STAY IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. (206)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-21-2011 - DISMISSAL ON FILE.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CONRAD, DANIEL ALFRED
